subcodes.first_line: O My Name, the All-Forgiving! Render thanks unto thy Lord, the All-Forgiving, Who, through His Name, the All-Forgiving, hath forgiven the sins of all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی الغفار ان اشکر ربک الغفار و انه باسمه الغفار غفر ذنوب العالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
